name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem: standalone Cubit + build123d via Plan A. 0.13.0 adds CadQuery interop (sibling OCCT CAD): execute_cadquery runs CadQuery scripts + cadquery_to_cubit_hex pipes cadquery → STEP → cubit_mesh_auto in one call, enabling interop with cadquery-mcp community. 0.12.0: cubit_examples unions forum + local lab (~750 files), build123d_examples + bd_warehouse.
author: Kengo Sugahara
